title: Roasted Fish Fillet with Indian Curry
description: A flavorful and aromatic dish combining the delicate taste of roasted fish fillet with the rich flavors of Indian curry.
instructions: Season the fish fillet with salt.
Heat olive oil in an oven-safe pan over medium heat.
Add the roasted curry paste and cook for 1 minute.
Place the fish fillet in the pan and cook for 2-3 minutes on each side.
Transfer the pan to the preheated oven and bake for 8-10 minutes or until the fish is cooked through.
Garnish with chopped cilantro before serving.
